testsuite.name: com.assetguard.presentation.routes.AdaptiveUIRoutesTest

testcase.name: GET layout with X-User-Id header returns correct layout
GET layout for STUDENT returns modern theme
GET layout response contains components array
GET layout without X-User-Id header returns 400
GET layout for SENIOR returns accessible theme
GET layout for invalid userType returns DEFAULT layout
GET layout for BUSINESS returns professional theme
GET layout with unknown user returns DEFAULT layout
